chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Bakr Bin Salih

text: و ما كان فيه عن بكر بن صالح فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن بكر بن صالح الرّازيّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: And whatever is narrated from Bakr bin Salih, I have narrated it from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali bin Ibrahim bin Hashim, from his father, from Bakr bin Salih Al-Razi.
